channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Kill Blue 动画 Casts Ikumi Hasegawa
item.description: Hasegawa voices marine sports prodigy Mai Otohime with dual shy & bold sides ― The staff for the television anime of Tadatoshi Fujimaki's Kill Blue manga announced on Saturday that kumi Hasegawa is... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Kill Blue Anime Casts Ikumi Hasegawa

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Grow Up Show: Himawari no Circus-dan Anime的 Ads Reveal Theme Song Artists, July 4 Debut
item.description: NOMELON NOLEMON performs opening song "Yurari Yureru," Aooo performs ending song "DAYS!" ― Aniplex, A-1 Pictures, and Psyde Kick Studio presented the second set of television commercials and a new... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Grow Up Show: Himawari no Circus-dan Anime's Ads Reveal Theme Song Artists, July 4 Debut

item.title: [PV][CAST][续作][公开] Anime News Network Welcome Demon School, Iruma-kun 季度 4的 2nd Main 宣传视频 Video 公开 More 声优阵容
item.description: Yūma Uchida, Yoshitsugu Matsuoka, Misato Matsuoka join cast ― The staff for the anime of Osamu Nishi's Welcome to Demon School, Iruma-kun (Mairimashita! Iruma-kun) manga presented the second main... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'Welcome to Demon School, Iruma-kun' Season 4's 2nd Main Promo Video Reveals More Cast

item.title: [CAST][公开] Anime News Network Tomb Raider King Animated Series 2nd Video 公开 Ending Song, More 声优阵容
item.description: QWER also performs ending song, Yūko Kaida joins cast as General Clark ― Kadokawa presented the second Japanese-language promotional video for the Korean-animated adaptation of artist 3B2S,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Tomb Raider King Animated Series' 2nd Video Unveils Ending Song, More Cast

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Disney Twisted-Wonderland 动画 Nominated N. American TV Critics Awards
item.description: Live-action Drops of God, Last Samurai Standing series also nominated ― The Television Critics Association (TCA) announced the nominees for its 42nd Annual TCA Awards on Friday. Disney... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Disney Twisted-Wonderland Anime Nominated for N. American TV Critics' Awards
